facebook.caption:
25,973 reviews. 4.6 stars. And it's an open zoo where animals roam free.

Vinpearl Safari Phú Quốc is the largest open-air wildlife park in Vietnam. Rare native species, exotic animals, and a conservation mission you can actually see in action.

Not a typical cage-and-walkway zoo. You ride through. Animals are close.

Bãi Dài, Phú Quốc. Worth a full day.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Riding through an open safari in the middle of Phu Quoc. Animals on both sides. No cages. Vinpearl Safari Phú Quốc has 25,973 reviews for a reason, see it before the crowds arrive.

facebook.caption:
This place fixes the noise in your head.

Dinh Cậu Lighthouse sits right at the rock edge of Dương Đông town. Sunrise here hits different. Salt air, fishing boats heading out, zero tour groups at 6am.

4.4 stars across 113 reviews and it costs nothing to visit. Just show up early.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fishing boats cutting through the mist. A lighthouse above the rocks. 6am at Dinh Cậu and you've got it almost to yourself. This is the Phu Quoc most visitors sleep through.

items.placeName: Hon Thom Departure Terminal - Sun World Hon Thom Nature Park

facebook.caption:
19,221 reviews. 4.5 stars. And most tourists still don't know what they're walking into.

Hon Thom Departure Terminal at Bãi Đất Đỏ is where you board the longest non-stop cable car over water in the world, straight to an island water park. The terminal itself is built like Ancient Rome, part shopping hub, part spectacle.

The cable car ride alone is worth the trip. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Step inside Hon Thom Departure Terminal at Bãi Đất Đỏ. Roman columns, souvenir shops, and a cable car that flies you over open ocean to a full island water park. 19,221 people rated this 4.5 stars. See why.

instagram.caption:
19,221 reviews. 4.5 stars. This cable car terminal looks like Ancient Rome.

Board at Bãi Đất Đỏ, fly over open ocean, land at a full island water park. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: Roman arches. Open ocean below. Island water park ahead. Hon Thom cable car hits different. Tag your travel buddy.

tiktok.caption: 19,221 reviews for THIS terminal in Phu Quoc. Roman-style, ocean cable car, island water park. Don't skip it. #PhuQuoc #HonThom #SunWorldHonThom #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel

items.placeName: Khu du lịch sinh thái (Suối Đá Bàn)

facebook.caption:
484 reviews. 4.1 stars. And most tourists scroll right past Suối Đá Bàn.

This eco-tourism zone sits in the interior of Phu Quoc, where flat granite boulders split a cool freshwater stream into natural pools. No beach clubs. No cocktail menus. Just rocks, water, and trees.

If your Phu Quoc trip is all sand and sunsets, this is the reset button.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the water move through the granite at Suối Đá Bàn. Flat rocks, fresh pools, zero crowds. This is the other side of Phu Quoc.

instagram.caption:
484 reviews and it's still this quiet. Suối Đá Bàn, Phu Quoc's freshwater rock pools.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Granite boulders. Cold freshwater. 4.1 stars and barely anyone here. Suối Đá Bàn hits different.

tiktok.caption: 484 people rated this and it's still empty. Suối Đá Bàn is Phu Quoc's freshwater secret. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNature #VietnamTravel

items.placeName: Quán cháo gà rẫy Phú Quốc
